subheadline: Turn ideas into apps in minutes — no coding needed
value_proposition: An AI-powered platform (Agent 4) that turns natural language prompts into fully deployed, full-stack apps with zero setup.
target_audience: Non-technical founders, PMs, designers, and enterprise teams who want to build and ship software without writing code

testimonials: By integrating with Lakebase and Databricks Apps, we're combining Replit's capabilities with trusted enterprise data and governance — Ali Ghodsi, CEO, Databricks
Replit Agent 4 is incredible. Its ability to take a one-shot prompt and flesh out the requirements before a full build is unmatched — Alex Meyers, Principal PM, Gusto
The parallel task execution is a game-changer for us — Barak Hirchson, Co-Founder & Chief AI Officer, Payouts.com
Replit gives our teams the 'superpowers' to prototype and scale internal solutions in hours rather than weeks — Shauna Geraghty, SVP, Talkdesk

pricing.model: freemium with self-serve paid tiers and contact-sales enterprise
pricing.price_anchoring: Free tier lowers entry barrier; Core framed as 'personal projects & simple apps'; Pro discounted from $100 to $90 with annual billing; Enterprise upsells on security and compliance

features: AI Agent writes production-ready code from natural language prompts
Parallel Agents execute multiple tasks simultaneously with full visibility before merging
Infinite Canvas for visual design that applies directly to live apps
Multiple Artifacts — build web, mobile, landing pages, and videos in one project
Built-in full-stack infrastructure: Authentication, Database, Hosting, and Monitoring with zero setup
differentiators: Agent 4 with Parallel Agents — simultaneous multi-agent task execution unique in market
Infinite Canvas — visual design layer that connects directly to code/app
'One-shot prompt' that fleshes out requirements before full build
Multiple Artifacts support shipping mobile, web, and video in a single project
Free first prompt with no credit consumption as zero-friction entry
trust_signals: Admin controls and advanced privacy controls
Single-tenant environments and VPC peering for Enterprise
Named enterprise customers: Databricks, Zillow, Gusto, Talkdesk

design_patterns.layout: Full-width hero with centered prompt input, followed by tabbed feature showcases, testimonial carousel, and pricing table
design_patterns.color_scheme: Dark background with high-contrast white text; accent colors used for UI mockups and CTAs
design_patterns.typography: Clean, modern sans-serif; large bold headlines, smaller descriptive body text
design_patterns.visual_style: Bold and technical with aspirational product UI showcases
notable_patterns: Prompt input field as hero CTA — mirrors the product itself
Animated/tabbed feature sections (Website, Mobile, Design, Slides, etc.)
Product UI screenshots embedded inline to demonstrate output quality
Testimonial carousel with named executives and company logos
Toggle switch for monthly/yearly pricing comparison

key_objections_addressed: No coding required — explicitly stated in hero
Free to start — 'Your first prompt is free. No credit consumption.'
Enterprise-grade security addressed with SOC 2, SSO, VPC peering
Team collaboration handled — up to 15 collaborators on Pro, 50 viewers
missing_or_weak: No scale or social proof metrics (no user count, apps built, or revenue processed)
No video demo or interactive product tour
No comparison chart against competitors (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Lovable, Bolt)
Press/media mentions absent despite being a well-known brand
Testimonials lack specificity — no measurable outcomes quoted (time saved, cost reduced)
Free tier limitations are vague ('Limited Agent intelligence', 'Publish 1 app')
No FAQ section addressing common concerns about AI code quality or lock-in
standout_elements: Hero CTA is the product itself — the prompt input box creates instant engagement and reduces friction
C-suite testimonials from recognizable enterprise brands (Databricks CEO, Zillow PM) add elite-tier credibility
Parallel Agents concept is visually explained and genuinely differentiated
Birthday promotion ('Replit Agent is free on May 2nd') creates urgency and shareability
Pricing page is transparent and self-serve — no 'call for pricing' gatekeeping until Enterprise tier
Infinite Canvas feature clearly targets Figma-adjacent users expanding into app development
